function.name: packages_md_query
function.description: Query the MiOS PACKAGES.md SSOT (at usr/share/mios/PACKAGES.md). Returns whether a package is included, the fenced-block category that installs it, and the install helper that consumes the block. Categories live in fenced ```packages-<category>``` blocks parsed by automation/lib/packages.sh:get_packages.

category.description: Optional category filter. 'all' searches every fenced block. Null defaults to 'all'.
